name: agenty
description: Turn natural language into ComfyUI image and video workflows.
long_description: agentY exposes a ComfyUI workflow toolkit as MCP tools — template selection, workflow assembly/validation/execution, HuggingFace model management, image handling, web search, and long-term memory. Pair it with the agentY Skills (comfyui-generate and friends) so the host orchestrates end-to-end image/video generation against a local ComfyUI instance.

tools.name: add_workflow_node
tools.description: Add a new node to an existing workflow file.

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Return an image so you can view and analyse it directly.

tools.name: apply_brainbriefing
tools.description: Apply a brainbriefing to a loaded workflow template in one atomic step.

tools.name: check_model
tools.description: Check whether model files exist in the current ComfyUI installation.

tools.name: clear_history
tools.description: Clear ComfyUI execution history. If prompt_id given, deletes that entry only.

tools.name: download_hf_model
tools.description: Download a file from a HuggingFace repo. Check model availability with check_model first.

tools.name: download_image
tools.description: Download a web image straight into ComfyUI's input folder so a workflow can load it.

tools.name: duplicate_workflow
tools.description: Create a copy of an existing workflow JSON with a fresh random seed.

tools.name: execute_workflow
tools.description: Run a fully-assembled, validated workflow on ComfyUI and return its outputs.

tools.name: execute_workflows_batch
tools.description: Run several validated workflows (a batch) on ComfyUI and return their outputs.

tools.name: find_hf_file
tools.description: Locate which Hugging Face repo(s) host a specific file.

tools.name: free_memory
tools.description: Free GPU/system memory in ComfyUI by unloading models and clearing caches.

tools.name: get_batch_status
tools.description: Return the live progress of a batch job started with start_batch_job.

tools.name: get_comfyui_dirs
tools.description: Return the authoritative ComfyUI server directory paths.

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Get recent ComfyUI execution history (status and output filenames only).

tools.name: get_image_resolution
tools.description: Return the resolution (width and height in pixels) of a local image file.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Get the latest ComfyUI error / exception block from the runtime log.

tools.name: get_model_info
tools.description: Fetch metadata and file list for a specific Hugging Face model.

tools.name: get_node_schema
tools.description: Get a structured schema for a ComfyUI node: required/optional inputs with types and defaults, output types, and descript

tools.name: get_prompt_status_by_id
tools.description: Check execution status for a specific prompt ID. Returns status and output filenames only.

tools.name: get_system_stats
tools.description: Return ComfyUI system info: GPU, VRAM, Python version, PyTorch version, OS.

tools.name: get_workflow_catalog
tools.description: Return the workflow template catalog as a flat {name: description} dictionary.

tools.name: get_workflow_node_info
tools.description: Return full metadata for a single node inside a saved workflow.

tools.name: get_workflow_template
tools.description: Load a workflow template by name. Saves the full workflow to a file and returns a compact summary with the file path.

tools.name: interrupt_execution
tools.description: Immediately stop the currently running ComfyUI workflow execution.

tools.name: list_batch_jobs
tools.description: List recent batch jobs (most recent first) with their state and progress.

tools.name: memory_read
tools.description: Search long-term memory for facts relevant to the current task.

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Persist a fact, preference, or workflow note to long-term memory.

tools.name: patch_workflow
tools.description: Apply targeted edits to a saved workflow without re-outputting the full JSON.

tools.name: queue
tools.description: Get or manage the ComfyUI execution queue.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read a text file from disk and return its contents as a plain string.

tools.name: register_workflow_template
tools.description: Register a custom ComfyUI workflow JSON as a reusable template (parse into index.json + add to the catalog).

tools.name: remove_workflow_node
tools.description: Remove a node from an existing workflow and clean up any links pointing to it.

tools.name: replace_node
tools.description: Replace a node with a different class_type while preserving all connections.

tools.name: run_script
tools.description: Run a shell command and return its stdout/stderr.

tools.name: save_workflow
tools.description: Save a complete workflow JSON to a file and return the file path.

tools.name: search_huggingface_models
tools.description: Search the Hugging Face Hub for models by keyword.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Search ComfyUI nodes by keyword across names, descriptions, and categories.

tools.name: start_batch_job
tools.description: Launch a headless batch run over many inputs and return its job_id immediately.

tools.name: stop_batch_job
tools.description: Stop a running batch job (graceful stop.flag + process terminate fallback).

tools.name: submit_prompt
tools.description: Submit a workflow to the ComfyUI execution queue. Returns prompt_id and client_id on success.

tools.name: unregister_workflow_template
tools.description: Unregister a custom workflow template by name (remove from index.json + catalog, delete its skills/<kebab> dir).

tools.name: update_workflow
tools.description: Add/remove nodes, patch inputs, and validate a workflow in one atomic step.

tools.name: upload_image
tools.description: Upload an image file to the ComfyUI input directory for use in workflows.

tools.name: validate_workflow
tools.description: Validate a ComfyUI workflow (local + server-side) without executing it.

tools.name: view_image
tools.description: Download a ComfyUI output image: save the full-resolution original to disk and return a viewable, downsized copy.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo and return relevant results as JSON.

tools.name: web_search_images
tools.description: Search the web for images using DuckDuckGo and return image URLs with metadata.

tools.name: write_text_file
tools.description: Write *content* to a file on disk (UTF-8).  Parent directories are

hf_token.title: HuggingFace token
hf_token.description: Token for downloading gated models (https://huggingface.co/ -> Access Tokens). Optional.

comfyui_api_key.title: ComfyUI API key
comfyui_api_key.description: Only needed if your ComfyUI requires auth or you use ComfyUI API nodes. Leave blank for local.

comfyui_url.title: ComfyUI URL
comfyui_url.description: Base URL of your running ComfyUI instance.
